description: Check today's outbound status by reading data/outbound_log_20260312.json and data/outbound_plan_20260312_EN.json. Determine: (1) Was outbound executed today? (2) What actions were completed (likes, replies, follows)? (3) Were there any failures? If outbound has NOT been run yet, check if data/content_plan_20260312_EN.json exists and run the full outbound cycle for EN account: spawn Outbound agent to create plan, then execute via publisher.py smart-outbound. Send summary to operator via Telegram when done.
notes: Today is 2026-03-12. EN account only (JP suspended). Check existing files before running anything to avoid duplicate actions.
